_comment_health: rc24+ replaced /status with /actuator/health/readiness (per dvarahq/dvara#665). The anonymous probe needs no Bearer.
_comment_secrets: Set DVARA_LICENSE_KEY, DVARA_ENCRYPTION_MASTER_PASSWORD, DVARA_ACTUATOR_API_KEY, DVARA_ACTUATOR_METRICS_API_KEY in the Railway service Variables tab. Railway doesn't have a SECRET type in railway.json — all four must be set out-of-band before first deploy or the gateway refuses startup.
